title: LN6 9BT, Lincwaste Limited: permit partial surrender issued - EPR/BW2978ID/S012
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the issue letter and partial surrender notice for:   Operator name: Lincwaste Limited Installation name: Whisby Landfill Permit number: EPR/BW2978ID/S012  "
